Subject-wise EEG ERP Report

This report shows ERP and PSD plots for this subject, split by session and condition.

  • ERP plots are baseline corrected from -100ms to 0ms.
  • PSD plots summarize frequency content for each ERP.
  • Combined plot overlays all available session-condition ERPs for quick comparison.
